prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约1073→1119→850→820→693，整体呈明显上升趋势（位次数字减小），近3年累计提升约426名；2025年基准约693名；本省物理类计划2021–2022年42人，2023–2024年37人，2025年28人，2026年28人，较2025年持平，但较2021年大幅缩招，竞争持续加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双 一流；软科主榜约第12名（2026年），属全国顶尖高校层次；2026年声誉评价中性/混合，无明显负面舆情；抖音热度排名第10（高热），反映报考关注度较高 ，竞争心理预期升温；机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、环境科学与工程A+、力学A+、计算机科学与技术A等17个A-及以上学科，工科实力顶尖，对高分考生吸 引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信等核心专业社会热度持续高热，相关专业报考竞争激烈；本省2026年物理类考生约13.7万人，较2025年13.9万人略降 ，竞争压力略有缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续上升趋势、2026年招生计划持平、抖音高热反映关注度上升、考生总数略降等因素，在 2025年基准693名基础上预计竞争继续小幅加剧；预测最低位次约680名，区间660–700名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 1073 → 1119 → 850 → 820 → 693, showing a clear upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative increase of about 426 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 693; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 42 in 2021–2022, 37 in 2023–2024, 28 in 2025, and 28 in 2026, unchanged from 2025 but significantly reduced compared to 2021, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 12th on the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), belonging to the top tier of national universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion; ranked 10th in Douyin popularity (high heat), reflecting high application attention and rising competitive psychological expectations; 17 A- or above disciplines including Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Mechanics A+, Computer Science and Technology A, etc., with top-tier engineering strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications continue to have high social popularity, leading to intense competition for related majors; the number of Physics Category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 137,000, slightly down from 139,000 in 2025, slightly easing competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the high Douyin popularity reflecting increased attention, and the slight decrease in total candidates, competition is expected to continue to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 693; the predicted minimum ranking is about 680, with a range of 660–700.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 660–700, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligence) as the main direction, with Tier 1 Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) as a stretch goal; if your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<660), you can focus on sprinting for the Tier 1 flagship major.
